scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build -w @neon-wreckers/integrations && tsc -p infrastructure/database/tsconfig.json && npm run build -w @neon-wreckers/api && npm run build -w @neon-wreckers/worker && npm run build -w @neon-wreckers/web && npm run build -w @neon-wreckers/admin && npm run build -w @neon-wreckers/overlay
scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run test:engine && npm run test:api && npm run test:content && npm run test:dependencies && npm run test:repository
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build
